site.name: Turborepo Starter
site.description: This is the Turborepo Starter web application.

metadata.homeDescription: Boilerplate for streamlined development of Turborepo applications with best practices and curated configurations.
metadata.showcaseDescription: Explore the state, feedback, theme, and layout foundations in this starter.
metadata.streamingDescription: See independent React Server Component boundaries stream into the page.
metadata.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist.

home.heading: Build from a stronger starting point.
home.introduction: A production-minded monorepo foundation with modern React, shared packages, typed state, and curated tooling already working together.

showcase.overviewDescription: A working tour of the foundations already wired into this starter. Change state, trigger feedback, switch themes, and move through the layout system.
showcase.stateDescription: Every control dispatches through the typed Redux hooks. Sonner confirms the same action without blocking the flow.
showcase.themeDescription: Theme tokens update every surface together. This page itself uses the snap mode, while the same primitives also support natural and full-height flows.

streaming.heading: Watch the server arrive in stages.
streaming.introduction: The route shell renders immediately. Each card then unwraps its own server promise inside an independent Suspense boundary.
streaming.primaryDescription: This boundary resolves first without waiting for the slower sibling below.
streaming.secondaryDescription: Independent work can finish later while the rest of the page stays usable.
streaming.skeletonDescription: The top progress bar covers navigation to this route. These skeletons cover server work that continues streaming after the route shell appears.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

manifest.name: Turborepo Starter
manifest.description: This is the Turborepo Starter web application.
